description: A new OTA update is available, and the customer wants to schedule it to install overnight.

nodes.task_description: Confirm a new update is available for the customer's vehicle.
Explain the new features or improvements included in the update.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the contents of the update from the release notes.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer to use their in-vehicle screen or mobile app to set a preferred installation time (e.g., 2 AM).

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions for scheduling the update.
